productDisplayName: CASIO Men Black Analogue & Digital Watch AD94
description: Case style: Digital watch with a circular case and a stainless steel backDial style: Black dial with glow-in-the-dark inlays on the hour and minute hands, a digital displayFeatures: Twin sensor that comprises of a digital compass and a thermometer, five alarms, stopwatch, world time and four press-buttons to adjust the features Strap style: Black synthetic strap, has a tang claspWater-resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature CASIO caseWarranty: 2 years against manufacturing defects from the date of purchaseWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
